questions.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
questions.a: There is no minimum order quantity! You can order as few as 1 hat. However, our best pricing starts at 12+ units, and the more you order, the lower the per-hat price.
Standard production time is 7-10 business days after proof approval. Rush orders (3-5 business days) are available for an additional fee. Please contact us for rush order availability.

questions.q: Can I mix hat colors in a single order?
questions.a: Yes! You can mix and match colors within the same hat model. Each color variation will be listed as a separate line item, but they all count toward your volume discount.

questions.q: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay through our secure Shopify checkout.

questions.q: What decoration methods do you offer?
questions.a: We offer flat embroidery, 3D puff embroidery, leather patches (debossed or engraved), PVC rubber patches, and woven patches. Each method has unique benefits depending on your design and intended use.

questions.q: What file formats do you accept for artwork?
questions.a: We accept AI, EPS, SVG, PDF, PNG, and JPG files. Vector formats (AI, EPS, SVG) produce the best results. If you only have a raster image, our design team can help convert it — a digitizing fee may apply for complex designs.

3D puff embroidery uses a foam backing under the stitches to create a raised, three-dimensional effect. It works best with bold, block-style lettering and simple logos. Fine details are better suited for flat embroidery.

questions.q: Can I see a proof before production?
questions.a: Absolutely! Every order receives a free digital proof (mockup) before we begin production. You can approve, request changes, or cancel at the proof stage at no charge.
Shipping is calculated at checkout based on order size and destination. Standard ground shipping in the US typically runs $5.99-$12.99. Free shipping is available on orders over $250.
Yes, we ship to Canada, UK, Australia, and most international destinations. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. Contact us for a shipping quote.

Because all hats are custom-made, we cannot accept returns for buyer's remorse. However, if there is a defect in materials or workmanship, or if the product doesn't match your approved proof, we'll make it right with a reprint or refund.
Yes! Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also check your order status anytime on our Order Status page using your order number and email.

questions.q: What hat brands do you carry?
questions.a: We stock premium brands including Richardson, Yupoong, Flexfit, Pacific Headwear, Otto Cap, and Outdoor Cap. Each brand offers unique styles, fits, and features. Browse our collection to find your perfect hat.

questions.q: What's the difference between trucker, snapback, and dad hats?
questions.a: Trucker caps have mesh back panels for breathability and a structured front. Snapbacks have solid panels all around with a flat or curved brim. Dad hats are unstructured, low-profile with a pre-curved brim and adjustable strap — the most relaxed fit.
Yes! We carry Flexfit stretch-fit caps in multiple sizes (S/M, L/XL, and more). These provide a clean, no-closure look with a comfortable elastic fit.
